mnemonics: ADAPT - Always Deliver Agile Projects Today
KISS - Keep It Simple, Stupid, for Change
keyPoints: Agility is about being adaptable to change
Change is inevitable in software development
The cost of change can be high in terms of time and resources
Agile methods help to minimize the cost of change
Flexibility is key in agile development
Continuous integration and delivery reduce the cost of change
Regular feedback and reflection help to identify and mitigate the cost of change
